changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/error.rs

All three variants of CodeContextError wrap String instead of source errors. This violates the Rust review guideline: 'Error::source() chains must exist for wrapped errors -- don't flatten the chain.'

The Io variant should wrap std::io::Error, Database should wrap rusqlite::Error, and Election should wrap ElectionError. Currently callers lose the ability to match on or inspect the underlying error.

Example fix:
```rust
#[error("io error")]
Io(#[from] std::io::Error),
#[error("database error")]
Database(#[from] rusqlite::Error),
#[error("election error")]
Election(#[from] ElectionError),
```
[BLOCKER] CodeContextError flattens error chains into strings
